creator: natbsd@instinctive.eu
text:
Created attachment 172921
Take maintenership + small improvements

Sorry for having forgotten to include a patch, and for the response delay (I hate it when work takes over so much of my free time).

I attached a patch to MAINTAINER= line, along with Dmitry Marakasov's improvements.

But now I wonder whether a reversion bump should be included too, because configure now find `jpeglib.h`, which adds the `image-jpeg` feature to the bottom line. And that is with exactly the same ports tree, only Poudriere version did change.
